title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dell India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dell India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
